title: The Armed Forces (Special Powers) Act, 1958
full_text: The Armed Forces (Special Powers) Act, 1958 सशस्‍त्र बल (विशेष शक्‍तियां) अधिनियम, 1958 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195828 Act Number: 28 Enactment Date: 1958-09-11 Act Year: 1958 Short Title: The Armed Forces (Special Powers) Act, 1958 Hindi Title: सशस्‍त्र बल (विशेष शक्‍तियां) अधिनियम, 1958 Long Title: An Act to enable certain special powers to be conferred upon members of the armed forces in disturbed areas in the States of Arunachal Pradesh, Assam, Manipur, Meghalaya, Mizoram, Nagaland and Tripura. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Internal Security Enforcement Date: 11-09-1958 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Armed Forces (Special Powers) Act, 1958 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Power to declare areas to be disturbed areas. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Special powers of the armed forces. Section 5. Arrested persons to be made over to the police. Section 6. Protection to persons acting under Act. Section 7. Repealed.
